title: duranta repens f. alba
intro: Duranta repens f. alba, also known as the White Skyflower, is a flowering plant species within the Duranta genus that belongs to the family Verbenaceae. It is native to tropical regions of the Americas and is valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The leaves and flowers of Duranta repens f. alba are used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
